content: Hi, I'm a podcast host, and I'm looking for new ideas for my true crime podcast. I'm based in Salt Lake City, UT, and I love hiking and exploring the outdoors.
That's a fascinating topic! What kind of true crime stories are you interested in covering? And how do you think your love of hiking and the outdoors could be incorporated into your podcast?
I'm really interested in covering cases that involve outdoor or wilderness settings. And I think my experience as a hiker could bring a unique perspective to the stories I tell.

That's a great idea! Using your personal experience to inform your storytelling could really help your listeners connect with the cases you're covering. Have you thought of interviewing any experts or investigators in the field?
Actually, I've been thinking of reaching out to a detective who worked on a case I'm interested in covering. And I've also been considering attending a true crime conference in Denver on June 10th.
That sounds like a great opportunity to learn more about the field and network with other professionals. What do you hope to get out of attending the conference?
I'm hoping to learn more about the latest investigative techniques and maybe even find some new cases to cover. And I'm also looking forward to meeting other true crime enthusiasts and podcasters.
It's always great to connect with others who share your passions. Have you thought of collaborating with any other podcasters or creators on a project?
Actually, I've been thinking of collaborating with a friend who's into calligraphy. Maybe we could create some visual elements to go along with my podcast.
That's a great idea! Using visual elements to enhance your storytelling could really help your listeners engage with the content. What kind of visual elements were you thinking of creating?
Maybe some illustrations or graphics to accompany the episodes. And I've also been thinking of creating a website to promote my podcast and share more information about the cases I'm covering.
That sounds like a great plan. I can help you brainstorm some ideas for your website and visual elements if you'd like.
